text:
A healthy lifestyle is about more than just eating well. A balanced diet with plenty of fruits and vegetables gives your body the nutrients it needs. Regular exercise, such as walking or cycling, is also important for strength and energy.

Equally crucial is getting enough sleep. Aim for seven to nine hours each night to help your body recover and your mind stay sharp. Don't forget your mental health; find time to relax and manage stress. Finally, maintain a good work-life balance. Make time for hobbies and social activities. By caring for your body and mind, you can feel healthier and happier every day.
